market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
articles.description: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

articles.title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
articles.description: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.

articles.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX prices shares at $135, raising $75 billion in largest-ever IPO
articles.description: The company's fully diluted value will be about $1.8 trillion, with the stock set to open for trade on Friday on the Nasdaq.

articles.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
articles.description: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the  risk of outright fraud.

articles.title: ETH futures traders lean into $1.6K range lows: Will Ether lead market recovery?
articles.description: ETH traders increased their long positions as Ether price traded near 2026 lows. Will ETH’s rebound eclipse the BTC recovery?

articles.title: Three signs that XRP price risks falling below $1 in June
articles.description: XRP is forming head-and-shoulders and bear flag setups on its shorter-timeframe chart, both indicating a dip below $1 in the coming days.

articles.title: Coinbase eyes World Cup boost as prediction markets surge: Bernstein
articles.description: Bernstein says the 2026 FIFA World Cup could inject billions into prediction markets, with Coinbase and Robinhood positioned to capture a wave of new users.

articles.title: Meta’s Edits app is getting an AI assistant and a desktop version
articles.description: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention.

articles.title: Coinbase launches AI agent accounts that can trade and spend on your behalf
articles.description: "Coinbase for Agents" is a new platform that lets AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude connect to users’ Coinbase accounts to trade crypto, access data and eventually make payments and purchases autonomously.

articles.title: Quantum Space’s military SPAC is trying to catch SpaceX’s IPO wave
articles.description: Quantum Space says SPACs aren't dead as it seeks a $1.2 billion deal to build military spacecraft.

articles.title: Banking rails are moving past the 'stablecoin winner' narrative: Sygnum
articles.description: Digital asset bank Sygnum says institutional clients want multiple tokenized cash instruments operating interchangeably on a single platform.

articles.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
articles.description: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

articles.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
articles.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

articles.title: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts
articles.description: MassPay taps Coinbase to add USDC-powered cross-border payouts, betting stablecoin rails will cut costs and speed up settlement for businesses paying globally.

articles.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
articles.description: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

articles.title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
articles.description: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto ETFs
articles.description: Global crypto ETFs saw significant outflows in May, but diversified exposures showed relative resilience; we explore what the data signals for long-term investors.

articles.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
articles.description: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

articles.title: U.S. House bill would erect crypto-theft task force across law enforcement agencies
articles.description: New legislation from a bipartisan duo would set up a multi-agency group under the U.S. attorney general to take a lead on cryptocurrency theft cases.
